A Program by HS108

Creative
Department

Our internal R&D lab. Where we research what the industry doesn't talk about enough, experiment with ideas that don't have a brief, and publish findings that are actually useful.

What It Is

The Creative Department is not a client-facing service. It's the part of HS108 that exists purely for curiosity — a dedicated allocation of time and resources for research, experimentation, and discourse.

Design thinking doesn't stop when client work does. The Creative Department is where we push ideas further, document patterns we notice across projects, and share work that has no deliverable except being interesting.

It exists because we believe the best design studios contribute to the field, not just to their clients.

Active Initiatives

CD-001 Active

Type in Context

An ongoing study of how typography behaves across cultures, scripts, and digital surfaces. Published as a living reference.

CD-002 Active

The Brand Archive

A curated repository of identity systems from Indian companies — documenting the visual language of a generation.

CD-003 Published

Grid Systems for Digital Products

Research into how editorial grid systems from print can be adapted for responsive digital layouts without losing structure.

CD-004 In Research

Motion as Language

When does motion communicate meaning versus distraction? A framework for intentional animation in product design.

Want to contribute?

The Creative Department occasionally brings in external contributors — researchers, writers, practitioners, and thinkers from adjacent fields. If you have something worth exploring, we'd like to hear about it.

cd@hs108.in

Start a Project

Interested in HS108's client work?

The Creative Department is our internal lab. Our client services are where we apply the thinking.
